nec.name: Necessities (NEC)
nec.description: Must-pay living costs: housing, food, utilities, transport, insurance, and other recurring essentials.

ffa.name: Financial Freedom (FFA)
ffa.description: Build long-term wealth: investments, retirement accounts, and anything that grows your financial independence.

ltss.name: Long-term savings (LTSS)
ltss.description: Big planned spends: vacations, vehicles, weddings, home projects—money you set aside for larger goals.

edu.name: Education (EDU)
edu.description: Grow your skills and earning power: courses, books, certifications, coaching, and professional development.

play.name: Play (PLAY)
play.description: Guilt-free fun: hobbies, dining out, entertainment, and experiences that recharge you without blowing the budget.

give.name: Give (GIVE)
give.description: Generosity: donations, gifts, community support, and causes you care about.
